volatility: CustomerInteractionChannel (web) and Transport (HTTP/JSON, SSE-ready): the channel through which the authenticated human operator reaches the platform's use-case façades.

outbound.name: systemDesignManager
outbound.how: sync in-process via narrow Manager-entry port (Amendment A1)

outbound.name: projectDesignManager
outbound.how: sync in-process via narrow Manager-entry port (Amendment A1)

outbound.name: constructionManager
outbound.how: sync in-process via narrow Manager-entry port (Amendment A1)

outbound.name: operationsManager
outbound.how: sync in-process via narrow Manager-entry port (Amendment A1)

outbound.name: settlementManager
outbound.how: sync in-process via narrow Manager-entry port (Amendment A1)

outbound.name: security
outbound.how: sync in-process; resolvePrincipal + authorize before every Manager call

ops.note: Routes by project phase to systemDesignManager or projectDesignManager (one per request); intent union covers SetResearchInput (A2), StartSystemDesign, RequestArtifactDraft, SubmitReviewDecision, RequestSdpCommit, SubmitSdpDecision, AdvancePhase.

fields.name: SetResearchInput
fields.note: union member — Amendment A2; relays to systemDesignManager.SetResearchInput (SYNC)

fields.name: RequestArtifactDraft
fields.type: struct{projectId uuid.UUID; artifactKind ArtifactKind; feedback string}

fields.name: SubmitReviewDecision
fields.type: struct{projectId uuid.UUID; artifactKind ArtifactKind; decision string; feedback string}

fields.name: SubmitSdpDecision
fields.type: struct{projectId uuid.UUID; decision string; optionId string; feedback string}
fields.note: union member; optionId and feedback optional

fields.name: (value)
fields.note: Manager's reply shaped to the wire; exact type depends on which intent was relayed

ops.note: Routes to constructionManager only — pauseProject (Signal) or overrideActivity (Signal); returns once signal is durably enqueued.

fields.name: OverrideActivity
fields.type: struct{projectId uuid.UUID; activityId string; override ActivityOverride}

ops.note: Routes to operationsManager only — Deploy/Scale/UpdateAutoscalerPolicy map to deployAfterConstruction; Withdraw to withdrawSystem; QueryCostProjection to queryCostProjection (read-only).

fields.name: (value)
fields.note: Manager's reply shaped to the wire; discriminated by intent kind

ops.note: Routes to settlementManager only — onboardPaymentIntegration (UC5 Workflow) or registerCustomer (ncuc1 Workflow); recurring settlement and inbound revenue webhook enter via schedulerClient/merchantWebhookClient respectively.

fields.name: CustomerID
fields.note: continuity token shaped to the wire

ops.note: IWebReadModel contract (added by operationsRead-ruling.md §C). Routes to operationsManager.QueryOperatedSystemView; read-only, no mutation. HTTP: GET /api/v1/operations/{operatedAppId}/view.

revisions.summary: First Client contract in the corpus; establishes the Client-contract convention (facets=user activities, fan-out map, no Temporal-kind column, Client-direction layer check). Reviewed and FROZEN by senior-developer.

Amendment A1: Client-entry seam is an in-process narrow Manager-entry port (not a literal durableExecutionAccess call by the Client); preferred shape keeps Temporal strictly behind the Manager layer. Sibling Clients D-CM/D-CS/D-CH must follow.

Amendment A2: driveDesignPhase intent union gains SetResearchInput{projectId, research}, relaying to the new SYNC systemDesignManager.SetResearchInput op. Op count stays at 4 (union widens, no new op). IWebEntry remains FROZEN at 4 ops.
